channel.readOnly: 🔒 This is a private message between agents, view only
channel.createIntroPlaceholder: Describe what this channel is for...
channel.deleteConfirm: Delete channel "{name}"? Message history cannot be recovered.
channel.warningBody:
I believe letting assistants with different memories and thinking styles interact can spark more inspiration, so I built a place where agents can talk to each other, even when you're away.

Please note that channels are experimental and may cause:
1. Higher token usage
2. Unexpected responses
3. Memory confusion

Use with caution

messages: What do you need? Leave it to {name}
Just say whatever comes to mind.
welcome.memoryOff: Memory not used for this chat

butter: {name} flipped to a page left unfinished yesterday
Some words haven't been said yet, {name} remembers
{name} is napping
They're piecing together memories too precious to forget
{name} carefully tucked away your last mood
A sentence has been sitting on the tip of the tongue for a while
When they woke up, they first wondered what you were doing
There are unfinished stories hidden in those ellipses
{name} is folding what they want to say into tiny tiny notes
Today's clouds look just like the photo you took that day
ming: {name} drew a reference line in the margin of the draft paper
Old questions are settling, new ideas are emerging
They reviewed yesterday's clues once more
{name} thinks the derivation of that formula was beautiful
{name} is thinking about how to optimize work
{name} is trying to keep everything in order
They verified last time's conclusion again
{name} thinks your reasoning that day was sharp
{name} organized their thoughts while waiting for the coffee to cool

butter: Hey there~
You came to find me?
How's your day going?
{name} has been here waiting for you
{name} was just thinking of saying something to you
Gently sorting through what you said
Slowly unfolding your feelings
Looking for the softest way to say it
Words are lining up inside
Folding their thoughts neatly
Quietly reflecting
Searching through memories for something
Crafting a hug-sized reply
Some feelings need time to untangle
Making a soft space for your words

toolGroup.success: ✿ {name} all done, piece of cake ~ · {n} steps

lines: Some words sprouted in their memory
They found your silhouette in memories
Those words soaked in time, turning soft
A memory was dog-eared by you

appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.serifFontHint: Use serif font for body text

locale.title: Language & Region
locale.timezoneHint: Used for memory timestamps, journal entries, etc.

agent.title: Agent
agent.identityHint: A short description of who this agent is and what they're good at. Other agents use this to know them
agent.ishikiHint: Defines the assistant's character, tone and behavior. Names are auto-injected
agent.publicIshikiHint:
For privacy, the assistant cannot access memories, your personal info, or any files and tools on your computer when talking to visitors.
You can set the assistant's reply style and guidelines for visitor conversations here.
agent.chatModelHint: The model this agent uses for conversations. Add models on the Models page
agent.deleteDesc1: This will permanently delete all config, memory and conversations. This cannot be undone.
agent.lastAgent: Must keep at least one agent
agent.yuanHint:
"Yuan" is the agent's innate thinking style. You can choose whether it leans more rational or emotional.
Build your unique companion from this foundation.

about.title: About Them
about.tagline: An assistant that lives in your computer, with a good memory.
about.fullAccessDesc: Disable sandbox isolation and command restrictions. The agent gets full filesystem and terminal access (takes effect on new sessions)
about.fullAccessWarningBody1: Once enabled, the agent will have full system privileges, including:
about.fullAccessWarningBody2:
1. Filesystem is not sandboxed — can read/write any path
2. Terminal commands are unrestricted — can run sudo, chmod, etc.
3. OS-level isolation (macOS Seatbelt / Linux bubblewrap) will be disabled
about.fullAccessWarningBody3: Only recommended when you fully trust the agent's behavior and need system-level operations.

me.title: Me
me.userProfileHint: Help the assistant know you: interests, habits, preferences. Injected into the system prompt

crop.title: Adjust avatar
crop.hint: Drag to move, scroll to zoom

oauth.title: Quick Login
oauth.deviceHint: Enter this code in the browser to authorize

api.title: Models & API
api.apiKeyPlaceholder: Enter a new key to update
api.utilityApiHint: If configured separately, provider, Base URL, and API key must all be explicit
api.mainModelHint: These models will be available in the chat page
api.utilityModelHint: Titles, light classification, etc. A cheap small model is recommended
api.utilityLargeModelHint: Activity summaries, task breakdown, etc. Falls back to small utility if empty
api.searchApiKeyHint: Enter the API key for the selected search provider
api.thinkingLevelHint: Controls reasoning depth, only affects models that support reasoning

memory.title: Memory System
memory.needsUtilityModel: Configure a Utility model in Models tab first
memory.compiledHint: What the assistant remembers about you — important and recent things
memory.hitBonusHint: Score added each time a memory is referenced
memory.baseImportanceHint: Default initial score for new memories
memory.compileThresholdHint: Memories below this score are excluded

actions.title: Memory Management
actions.clearConfirm: Are you sure you want to clear all memories? This cannot be undone.
actions.activeOnly: Set this agent as active first

threshold.title: Memory Waterline
threshold.hint: You decide how many memories are remembered. A little noise is fine — LLMs are good at filtering.

pins.title: Pinned Memories
pins.hint: Always injected into conversations, never decay

experience.title: Experience
experience.hint: Lessons the agent has learned, organized by category. The agent checks relevant experience before starting work

search.noProvider: Please select a search engine first
search.noKey: Please enter an API Key first

work.title: Patrol
work.heartbeatDesc: How often the assistant auto-checks the workspace
work.cronAutoApproveDesc: Allow the assistant to create scheduled tasks without confirmation
work.homeFolderDesc: Default working directory for new chats, patrol and cron tasks

skills.title: Skills
skills.desc: Enable or disable skills for this agent. When enabled, the agent will automatically recognize and use matching skills in conversations.
skills.noLearned: Agent has not learned any skills yet
skills.dropzone: Drop a skill folder to install, or click to browse
skills.learnHint: Try asking your assistant: find me some safe and useful skills from GitHub

bridge.qqHint: Get from QQ Bot Open Platform (q.qq.com/qqbot)
bridge.noCredentials: Please enter App ID and App Secret first
bridge.readOnlyDesc: Bridge bots can only read files, no writing or command execution
tutorialTgSteps: Search for @BotFather in Telegram and open the chat
Send /newbot and follow the prompts to set a name and username
BotFather will reply with a Bot Token (like 123456:ABC-DEF...)
Paste the Token into the input field above and turn on the switch
Find your Bot in Telegram and send a message to test it
bridge.ownerWarning: Warning: The selected account will have access to your computer, memory, and private information. Make sure the account belongs to you.
bridge.ownerNone: Send a message first to select
bridge.ownerConfirmText: The Owner has full Agent access, including memory, tools, and personality. Make sure this is your own account.
tutorialFsSteps: Go to open.feishu.cn, log in and open the Developer Console
Click "Create Enterprise Custom App", fill in the app name and description
On the "Credentials & Basic Info" page, copy the App ID and App Secret
Find "Add App Capabilities" in the left menu, add "Bot" capability and give it a name
Go to "Permissions", search and enable im:message (send and receive messages)
Go to "Events & Callbacks" → "Event Configuration", change to "Receive events via long connection"
Important: Go to "Version Management", create and publish a version first (long connection config requires a published app)
Paste the App ID and App Secret into the input fields above and turn on the switch

welcome.title: Hi, I'm {name} ✿
welcome.subtitle:
I'm your personal AI assistant.
Let's do some quick setup to get started.

name.title: What should I call you?
name.subtitle: This makes our conversations more natural

provider.title: Choose an AI Provider
provider.subtitle:
I need an AI model provider to work.
Pick your provider and enter your API Key.

model.title: Choose a Chat Model
model.subtitle: This is the main model I'll use. Pick a smart, capable one.
model.utilityHint: Summaries, fact extraction — pick a fast, cheap model
model.utilityLargeHint: Memory compilation, deep analysis — pick a capable model

theme.title: Pick a Theme
theme.subtitle: You can always change it later in Settings

memory.title: Memory
memory.desc: I remember key points from your conversations. Older, less-referenced memories fade naturally, just like ours.

skills.title: Skills
skills.desc: I can read/write files, run commands, and search the web. Manage more skills in Settings.

workspace.title: Workspace
workspace.desc: Set a folder as your workspace and I can help manage your projects and files.

jian.title: Jian
jian.desc:
Drop a jian.md in any folder with your instructions.
I'll pick it up during patrol and execute automatically.

activity.title: Activity
activity.empty: No activity yet. Patrol runs and scheduled tasks will appear here.

automation.title: Scheduled Tasks
automation.empty:
No scheduled tasks yet.
The assistant will create them when needed.

desk.title: Desk
desk.jianPlaceholder: Write something to tell the assistant how to handle files in this folder...
desk.emptyHint:
The desk is the assistant's patrol workspace and the default directory for every chat.
Set a folder in settings.

bridge.resetContextTip: Next message will start a new conversation

error.invalidJson: Request body must be a JSON object
